name: Idle City
description: Experience City Building Like Never Before Discover Idle City builder Island, an innovative city-builder game by Sparkling Society. As the mayor of a small town on a single island, youll embark on a journey to explore the world, unlocking breathtaking new islands to establish thriving cities. Idle City Builder offers a unique experience of expanding horizons and skylines across various islands, each boasting distinct themes and terrains. Enjoy this captivating city game without an internet or Wi-Fi connection, and play this casual city-building game series on mobile!
